(DEVICE FILE: MICROSIM_7P_MICROSIM_7P_MICROSI)

PACKAGE MICROSIM_7P
CLASS IC
PINCOUNT 11

PINORDER MICROSIM_7P_MICROSIM_7P_MICROSI CLK DATA DET GND RST S1 S2 S3 S4 VCC VPP
FUNCTION G1 MICROSIM_7P_MICROSIM_7P_MICROSI C3 C7 C4 C5 C2 S1 S2 S3 S4 C1 C6

PACKAGEPROP PART_NAME MICROSIM_7P
PACKAGEPROP VALUE MICROSIM_7P

END
